  "findings": [
    "Nails placed too high, violating manufacturer installation specifications.",
    "Exposed nails present, creating immediate pathways for water intrusion and wind uplift vulnerability."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove affected shingles and reinstall using correct nail placement and sealing techniques.",
    "Apply manufacturer-approved sealant over any exposed nail heads as a temporary measure, or replace damaged shingles entirely."
  ],
  "rationale": "Nail placement that is high or exposed violates both IRC R905 requirements and manufacturer installation specifications. High nailing reduces wind resistance and can cause shingles to slip, while exposed nails lead to leaks. Because the work is roughed in but not yet closed out, these defects must be corrected before acceptance.",
